title: Update company name and slogan across all UI

requirements.text: Replace all occurrences of the company name throughout the application with 'TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)'. This includes the HTML page title in frontend/index.html, all translation strings in frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts (English, Hindi, and Odia entries), and any hardcoded references in components such as Header.tsx, Hero.tsx, Footer.tsx, SchemeInfo.tsx, and WhyChooseUs.tsx.

quotes: Change the name of the company TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)

acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab title reads 'TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)'
The header/nav bar displays the full company name
The footer displays the full company name
No old or partial company name variants remain visible in any language (EN/HI/OD)

requirements.text: Update the company slogan to 'Empowering Odisha with Clean Energy' in all translation entries (English, Hindi, Odia) within frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts, and wherever the slogan/tagline is rendered in components such as Hero.tsx and Footer.tsx.

quotes: Slogan - empowering Odisha with clean energy

acceptanceCriteria: The hero section tagline reads 'Empowering Odisha with Clean Energy'
The footer tagline/slogan reads 'Empowering Odisha with Clean Energy'
The slogan is consistent across all supported languages (EN/HI/OD) — Hindi and Odia translations should convey the same meaning
No previous slogan text remains anywhere in the UI

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/ (immutable paths)
All text changes must be applied via the i18n translations file where translation keys are already used; hardcoded strings in components should also be updated
nonGoals: Changing the visual design, color scheme, or layout
Modifying backend logic or data models
